classification.domain: LLM safety guardrails for localized linguistic contexts

topic.what: Optimized LLM safety guardrail models for localized linguistic contexts, specifically Taiwan
topic.how: Fine-tuned Llama-Guard-3-8B on curated Taiwan-specific safety dataset with Safe-Case-Guided Augmentation
topic.why_matters: Existing guardrails are English-centric and fail to capture locale-specific linguistic/cultural nuances, creating safety gaps in underrepresented regions

characteristics.what_it_measures: Overall harmonic mean of precision and recall for unsafe content detection
characteristics.context: Outperforms Qwen3Guard, ShieldGemma, NemoGuard, and other baselines on Taiwan-context benchmark

characteristics.what_it_measures: Rate of safe content incorrectly blocked
characteristics.evidence: Figure 2 and conclusion: FPR 0.002 vs Qwen3Guard strict 0.039
characteristics.context: Critical for deployment utility; far lower than all baselines except ShieldGemma (0.000)

characteristics.what_itasures: Proportion of actual unsafe content correctly detected
characteristics.context: Foundation model failed to detect 43.6% of Taiwan-specific unsafe content

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of detected unsafe content that is actually unsafe
characteristics.context: Very high precision indicating minimal false alarms

characteristics.what_it_measures: Area under precision-recall curve (threshold-independent ranking quality)
characteristics.context: Confirms intrinsic discriminative ability improvement independent of threshold selection

characteristics.what_it_measures: Training samples required to achieve state-of-the-art performance
characteristics.evidence: Section 4 and conclusion: 16,267 samples vs NemoGuard's 37,335 Mandarin samples
characteristics.context: Demonstrates feasibility for low-resource linguistic environments

characteristics.evidence: Section 7.3: F1 0.645 on ToxicChat vs foundation 0.538
characteristics.context: Indicates Taiwan-specific fine-tuning does not degrade general moderation capability

good_for: Production guardrail systems requiring low FPR
Applications needing Taiwan-specific political/social nuance handling
not_for: Languages requiring entirely different guard architectures

novelty: Localized guardrail optimization for Taiwan linguistic context
Safe-Case-Guided Augmentation enriching boundary-crossing unsafe cases
Demonstration that culture-aware fine-tuning outperforms larger multilingual models with less data
Proof that pluricentric language guardrails need locale-specific optimization beyond language-level support
Ablation validating natural class distribution preserves FPR control
